ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the electrical component */,
  "cl_number" TEXT /* Classification number associated with the part */,
  "number_of_contacts" INTEGER /* Total number of electrical contacts in the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the product was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of dimensions */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the product */,
  "dimension_a" REAL /* Dimension A of the product */,
  "dimension_b" REAL /* Dimension B of the product */,
  "dimension_c" REAL /* Dimension C of the product */,
  "dimension_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for dimensions (e.g., mm, inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dimensions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the product */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Current quantity available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity level to trigger a reorder */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the product in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the customer who placed the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier-product association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the supplier */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the product that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., added, updated, deleted) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the sold product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the customer who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the sale being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was received */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
